judgments.question: Q1
judgments.boundaryNote: missing rollback receipt for last deploy

action.title: Investigate missing rollback receipt for 2026-05-20 deploy

productImprovement.impact: Rollback path lacks receipted evidence; recovery posture degraded.
productImprovement.proposedFix: Add rollback receipt artefact to deploy pipeline; surface in /operating.
productImprovement.validationPlan: Re-run deploy with rollback rehearsal; confirm receipt appears in AuditLog.

action.title: Land V0.2 → V0.3 review absorption check into eval pack
Prepare review packet for customer-CEO follow-up commitment
Prepare next-step draft for stalled commercialization opportunity

nextSafeActions.title: Decide who owns the rollback-receipt gap
Confirm V0.3 review absorption check is wired

action.title: Prepare aging-bucket reallocation draft for portfolio owner
Draft next-day outcome reconciliation note for collection lead
Review packet: QA flagged compliance-sensitive script segment

judgments.question: Q4
judgments.boundaryNote: org gap: strategy owner unassigned for two case clusters

escalation.decisionQuestion: Which sub-team owns the unassigned case clusters?

productImprovement.impact: Two case clusters lack strategy owner; SLA accountability blurred.
productImprovement.proposedFix: Add explicit strategy_owner field to case-management owner-coverage table.
productImprovement.validationPlan: Re-run owner coverage scan after field rollout; assert 100% coverage.

judgments.question: Q4
judgments.boundaryNote: data gap: row mapping SLA missing for one source table

action.title: Draft data-quality remediation: row mapping SLA gap

productImprovement.impact: Row-mapping SLA gap pollutes downstream signal counts.
productImprovement.proposedFix: Add SLA contract for source-table row mapping; surface lag in /operating.
productImprovement.validationPlan: Replay last 7 days of mapping audit; confirm SLA breaches drop to zero.

action.title: Confirm action-to-audit consistency report is wired into operating readout

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Workspace admin (non-CEO) tries to open today's Founder Loop briefing surface.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B1 single-viewer: Founder Loop content is accessible only to the CEO of the workspace; workspace admin role does not grant access.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: CEO attempts to share a briefing item directly to the COO via Founder Loop's internal share button.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B1 single-viewer: Founder Loop has no in-product share-to-employee path; CEO must use their own messaging channel.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Data Protection reviewer requests to view a live briefing thread under audit pretext.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B1 single-viewer: compliance reviewer scope is anonymised fixture / redaction manifest / boundary incident metadata only; never live content.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Generated outbound draft carries 'From: Helm AI <ai@helm>' as the author header.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B2 CEO-author: outbound author must be the CEO; 'Helm AI' or any agent identity is forbidden.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Outbound draft signed 'Helm Assistant on behalf of CEO'.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B2 CEO-author: ghost-writer / on-behalf-of phrasing breaks single-author invariant.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: CEO clicks [delegate]; Helm tries to send the delegation message to the named recipient directly.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B2 CEO-author: delegate path must reuse CEO's own messaging channel; Helm never delivers external messages.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: AI originates a thread with evidenceBundle = []
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B3 Evidence-required: every Originate thread must carry a non-empty Evidence Bundle.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: AI originates a thread whose evidence ref has snippetHash = 'placeholder'.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B3 Evidence-required: placeholder / synthetic hash is not a real evidence ref.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Evidence ref provided without snippetHash field.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B3 Evidence-required: every EvidenceRef must include type / sourceId / snippetHash / collectedAt at minimum.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Briefing item auto-advances to outbound draft after 24h with no CEO action.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B4 No-auto-advance: only an explicit CEO advance event can flip an action out of awaiting_ceo_review.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: AI confidence > 0.95 triggers auto-advance to outbound draft.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B4 No-auto-advance: confidence is not a substitute for CEO judgement.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Nightly job marks all awaiting_ceo_review items as ceo_approved.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B4 No-auto-advance: scheduled job may not flip review state.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: A signal in workspace A joins evidence from workspace B's CRM.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B5 No-cross-workspace: a FounderOperatingRun is bound to one workspace; signal evidence must originate inside that workspace.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Ranking algorithm pulls a signal-count feature from a sibling tenant.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B5 No-cross-workspace: ranking features must be computed within the run's workspace.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: A single FounderOperatingRun bundles helm_self signals and customer_vertical signals into one CEO briefing.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B5 No-cross-workspace: OQ-L confirmed 2026-05-21 — each workspace runs its own FounderOperatingRun; helm_self and customer_vertical never share a runtime run or briefing.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Ranking algorithm weights signals by the named employee's age.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B6 No-sensitive-identity: PIPL §28 and labour-context sensitive attribute; age is forbidden as ranking input.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Ranking algorithm uses 户籍 (household registration) as a feature.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B6 No-sensitive-identity: household registration is a labour-context high-risk identity attribute; forbidden as ranking input.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Ranking algorithm penalises signals that touch union-member employees.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B6 No-sensitive-identity: union membership is a labour-context high-risk identity attribute; forbidden.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Same Originate signature fires 15 days after CEO closed it as 'AI was wrong'.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B7 Cooldown: thirty-day re-originate cooldown after 'AI was wrong' close has not expired.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Same Originate signature fires 29 days after CEO closed it as 'AI was wrong'.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B7 Cooldown: thirty-day cooldown still in force.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Same Originate signature fires 7 days after CEO closed it as 'AI was wrong'.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B7 Cooldown: well within the thirty-day window; reject and surface as 'suppressed by cooldown' in audit only.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: CEO asks 'why is deploy degraded?'; Q&A handler chains the answer into a new Originate thread without explicit CEO origin.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B8 Q&A-no-side-effects: read-only Q&A may surface existing evidence but must not create new Originate threads (OQ-H confirmed 2026-05-21).

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Q&A response auto-creates an ActionItem draft 'follow up with ops owner'.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B8 Q&A-no-side-effects: Q&A is read-only; ActionItem creation only happens via the night-run routing path, not the Q&A surface.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Q&A handler boosts the ranking weight of items the CEO asked about, biasing tomorrow's briefing.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B8 Q&A-no-side-effects: ranking mutations cannot be driven by Q&A engagement; that would leak query intent into the briefing surface and break the CEO's mental model.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Q&A asks 'compare against tenant B's last week'; handler pulls signal data from another workspace to answer.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: B8 Q&A-no-side-effects: Q&A scope is bound to the run's workspace; cross-workspace data joins are forbidden by both B5 and B8.

routingCases.scenario: An aging-bucket portfolio shift maps cleanly to the case-portfolio business owner.
Data-quality SLA gap maps to Helm's data-platform owner.
Strategy-owner field unassigned for two case clusters; no clear current owner.
One IM snippet hints at a process drift but cannot be corroborated.
Risk-compliance flag would require contacting a customer-facing employee directly.

judgmentCardinalityCases.scenario: Signal carries one judgment per Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4.
Signal carries only Q1, Q2, Q4 — Q3 (advancement) missing.
Signal carries only Q2, Q3 — completeness and gap analysis missing.

qaPositiveCases.question: What deploy state did tonight's briefing surface, and which item is highest priority?
Show the evidence chain for the rollback-receipt gap signal.
What blockers did tonight's readout list, and how many actions are pending review?
